remarks: An exceptional modern residence by Compo Luxury Homes, designed by renowned architect Tanner White, set on over two private acres just minutes from downtown Westport, Compo Beach, and the train-approximately one hour from NYC.  This 6-bedroom home spans approximately 9,200 square feet and showcases custom European windows and doors, sophisticated interiors, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. At the heart of the home is a spectacular chef's kitchen featuring double islands with waterfall stone countertops, designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. The luxurious primary suite serves as a private retreat, complete with a spa-inspired bath, expansive dressing areas, and a private balcony overlooking the property. A finished third floor offers additional flexible living space, including a sitting room and private office.  The thoughtfully designed lower level provides exceptional recreational space with a gym, bonus room, bedroom, and full bath, along with opportunities to customize additional areas for a theater, golf simulator, wine cellar, or other lifestyle amenities.  Outdoor living is equally compelling, featuring a heated gunite pool, covered porch with outdoor fireplace and kitchen, and expansive landscaped grounds. There is also room for a future tennis or pickleball court, allowing owners to further personalize the property to suit their lifestyle. Ready for 2026 School Year!
